metadata.description: Bundled packs for the research harness. Each pack is a Claude Code plugin under packs/<name>/; the harness.config.json packs[] control plane enables or disables each one.

plugins.name: market-research
plugins.description: Methodology pack: sizing, Porter's, personas, financial, regulatory. Disabled by default.

plugins.name: trend-modeling
plugins.description: Methodology pack: three-valued INC/DEC/CONST trend logic under data scarcity.

plugins.name: reports
plugins.description: Genre pack: exec-summary, academic, engineering, trend-analysis, briefing deliverable templates.

plugins.name: channels
plugins.description: Channel pack: notebooklm, pdf, github-discuss, github-issues render adapters.
